login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: sign in to the admin panel

twoFactor.title: Two-factor verification
twoFactor.hint: Enter the 2FA code from your authenticator app.
twoFactor.hintBackup: Enter any one of the emergency codes you saved when you set up 2FA (8 hex characters). They are single-use: once a code is used it no longer works, but the others remain valid.
twoFactor.backupHelpFooter: Don't know how many you have left? Once signed in, go to Settings → Security to see the count and regenerate them.
twoFactor.backup: Use a backup code (if you lost your authenticator app)

errors.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Retry in {seconds} seconds.
errors.rateLimitedFallback: Too many attempts. Retry in a few seconds.
errors.invalid2fa: Invalid code. Check your phone's clock and try again.
errors.wrongDomain: You are on the wrong domain. Redirecting to the lookup for your site…

dashboard.title: Tiles
dashboard.empty: No tiles yet. Add the first one.
dashboard.emptyHint: Start composing your page by adding a tile.
dashboard.footerLockedHint: The footer always stays at the bottom.

editBlock.deleteConfirm: Delete this tile? This cannot be undone.
editBlock.visibleTitle: Show the tile on the site
editBlock.hiddenTitle: Hide the tile from the site
editBlock.applyDividerToAll: Apply this style to every separator
editBlock.applyDividerConfirm: Apply this style and background to every separator on the page?
editBlock.applyDividerConfirmLong: Apply this separator style to ALL the separators on the page? The current settings will replace those of the other separators. (This cannot be undone.)
editBlock.applyDividerHint: Do you have several separators on the page and want them all to look the same? This button applies the current style (even if unsaved) to ALL separators on the page and takes you back to the admin home.
editBlock.backgroundNoneTitle: Transparent tile, content sits directly on the page
editBlock.backgroundHint: "No background" removes bg, border and shadows for this tile only
editBlock.spanOnlyDesktop: Desktop only · always full on mobile
editBlock.previewSavedNotice: The preview shows the last saved version. {save} to see the current changes.
editBlock.previewHint: Isolated preview of this tile. Save to refresh.

presets.title: Presets
presets.hint: Apply a curated theme. You can tweak it after.
presets.intro: Available families: {nativa} (native) and {sunrise}. Other families will be added progressively.

help.bg: Background color of the entire page, visible behind all tiles and around them.
help.surface: Base color of every tile (link, social, gallery, products, etc.). When tiles are "Transparent" or "Glass", it is derived from here.
help.surface_alt: Background for elements inside tiles: buttons, inner links, badges, hover.
help.text: Main text: headings, paragraphs, links, prices.
help.text_muted: Secondary text: subtitles, captions, minor descriptions and background patterns.
help.accent: Primary call-out color: "Buy" buttons, active links, discount badges, ring around the avatar.
help.accent_alt: Secondary variant of the call-out color. Badge background.
help.accent_soft: Companion of the primary accent: background of chips that host accent elements (icon square of links, social pills). Leave empty to auto-derive a tinted version of the accent; set a color (e.g. #ffffff) to control it by hand (e.g. white social pills with colored icon).
help.accent_alt_fg: Companion of the secondary accent: text that appears on top of the secondary accent (badge). Pick a color with good contrast on that background — generic white/black is often not the best choice, you can fine-tune here.
help.border: Thin borders between tiles and elements. Often translucent to avoid stealing attention (e.g. rgba with low alpha).

tile.title: Tiles
tile.glassHint: The glass effect shows when there's a visible background behind it — especially with a photo or a high-intensity pattern.
tile.mobileHint: On smartphones, the {minimal} mode can be useful: it hides the tile shape for less margin and more screen for content. Tiles disappear: borders, radius and background are not applied on mobile, vertical spacing between tiles stays the same as desktop. On desktop nothing changes.

background.title: Background
background.hint: Pick the decorative pattern behind the tiles.
background.imagePlaceholder: Drag a large image (1920px+) here for the background
background.imageHint: Fills the entire viewport (cover). Typically better with a large, low-"noise" image.

preview.title: Preview · Mobile
preview.hint: The preview updates live while you edit. The admin panel appearance only changes on save.

errors.invalidFields: Some fields are invalid. Fix them and try again.
errors.deleteGeneric: Network error. Try again in a few minutes.

site.siteTitleHelp: Shown in the browser tab, in social sharing (og:title) and in Google search results. Keep it short (max ~60 characters).
site.siteTaglineHelp: Subtitle joined to the title in the page's <title> (e.g. "Maurizio — My digital card").
site.siteDescriptionHelp: Site summary: appears below the title in search results and when the link is pasted on social/Whatsapp/Slack. Aim for ~155 characters.
site.siteAuthorHelp: Name of the site's main author. Goes in the "author" meta and in the JSON-LD structured data for Google.
site.siteLocaleHelp: ISO code of the main language (e.g. it, en, fr). HTML lang attribute — useful for accessibility and automatic translation.

seo.canonicalUrlHelp: Leave empty in 99% of cases: your site only lives at one address and we use it automatically. Only fill in if your site also responds from another domain (e.g. you have a custom domain that redirects): put the one you want to be "the main one" for Google here.
seo.canonicalUrlHint: Must start with http:// or https://
seo.robotsIndexHelp: When off, <meta name="robots" content="noindex,nofollow"> is added and Google/Bing won't show the site in results. Useful for staging environments or private pages.
seo.ogImageHelp: Image shown when you share a link to your site on Facebook, Twitter, Telegram, Whatsapp. Recommended size 1200×630 px.
seo.faviconHelp: The small icon that appears in the browser tab and bookmarks. Upload a square image (PNG, JPG or WEBP) — we automatically generate every needed size. Ideally 512×512 or larger to avoid blurry edges on large devices.
seo.twitterHandleHelp: Your username on X (with or without @). Used in twitter:site/twitter:creator when the link is shared, to attribute it to you in the preview.

contact.notifyEmailHelp: If filled in, every message sent from the Contacts form is also forwarded to you via email (in addition to being saved in "Messages"). Leave empty to receive only in the admin. To make sure messages reach you, whitelist the address configured as MAIL_FROM_ADDRESS on this server in your accepted contacts.

language.title: Admin language
language.hint: The admin interface adapts to your browser. You can override it here.
language.label: Language

security.title: Security
security.changePasswordHint: Change your account's password at any time. You'll be redirected to a dedicated page that asks for current + new password (the page is separate from the admin for security reasons).
security.twoFactorIntro: Adds a second step to login: in addition to the password, you'll need to enter a 6-digit code generated by an authenticator app (Google Authenticator, 1Password, Aegis, Authy). Works with any TOTP app.
security.twoFactorBackupRemainingHint: out of 10 (a backup code is consumed when you use it instead of the TOTP code).
security.twoFactorSetupHint: Scan the QR code with an authenticator app (Aegis, 1Password, Google Authenticator…) and enter the 6-digit code to confirm.
security.twoFactorSetupStep1: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app (or copy the secret manually if you prefer).
security.twoFactorSetupStep2: Enter the 6-digit code generated by the app to confirm that it works.
security.twoFactorSecretLabel: Secret (manual, if the QR can't be read):
security.twoFactorBackupHint: They are needed to sign in if you lose the authenticator app. Each one is single-use. We won't show them again.
security.twoFactorDisableIntro: Your account will only be protected by the password again. To confirm, type

export.title: Export home page
export.hint: Download a single index.html file with CSS, theme and all images embedded (data URI). It opens in any browser even without a server, and can be uploaded to static hosting (Netlify, GitHub Pages, S3). Only Google fonts and Iconify icons remain online-only.
export.warning: Some features cannot work in the standalone HTML and are excluded from the export:
export.warningExclTitle: Some features require the tylio server and will NOT be included:
export.warningContactTileNote: — excluded from export (the form sent data to the tylio server to save it and notify you by email; without a backend it can't work).
export.warningEmailNotifyNote: — excluded (depend on the contacts module above).
export.warningClickCountNote: — excluded (the metric was sent to a tylio endpoint).
export.warningAdminNote: — not included (it's only the public home page).
export.warningFooter: Everything else (text, images, products, links, social, gallery, YouTube, podcast, embed, FAQ, quotes, numeric stats, timeline, dividers, hero, bio, footer, CTA) is fully included and works offline.

account.title: Delete account and page
account.deleteHint: Permanently delete your account and all data. This cannot be undone.
account.deleteIntro: The data cannot be recovered: we will permanently and completely delete from our archive all blocks, settings, theme, uploaded images, received messages and statistics. The subdomain is also freed and becomes available again.
account.deleteTypeInField: in the field below and click "Delete permanently".

submissions.title: Inbox
submissions.deleteAllConfirm: Delete every submission? This cannot be undone.
submissions.deleteAllConfirmCount: Delete ALL {count} saved submissions? This cannot be undone.
submissions.infoLead: Messages sent via the {contact} form on your home are {savedHere} so you never lose them (even if email delivery fails).
submissions.infoMissingPrefix: To also receive them {byEmail}, set "Notification email" under

mailStatus.noServer: Server not configured for sending email
mailStatus.noEmailSet: No email for messages set in Settings

media.title: Media
media.dragHint: JPG, PNG, WebP, GIF, SVG · max 10 MB
media.removeImageConfirm: Remove the image? (The file stays in the library.)
media.dragOrClick: Drag files here or click to upload
media.dragOrClickShort: Drag files here or click to upload
media.urlOrLibrary: Image URL or pick from library

iconPicker.title: Search icon
iconPicker.noResults: No results for "{q}". Try in English (e.g. "phone", "mail", "link").
iconPicker.resultsFooter: {n} results · search in English · lucide + simple-icons

avatarPicker.previewCircular: Preview of the circular crop. Dark areas will not be visible on the home.
avatarPicker.uploadHint: Upload a photo or a logo. It will be shown circular at the top of the home.
avatarPicker.sizeRequirements: JPG, PNG, WebP, SVG · max 10 MB · ideally 1024×1024 (1:1 ratio, minimum 512×512).

faviconUploader.uploadErrorFromMedia: Error: cannot generate favicon from the selected file
faviconUploader.faviconActiveHint: Favicon active. Automatically generated sizes 32, 180, 192, 512 px in {path}.

ogImageUploader.removeConfirm: Remove the image? (The file stays in the library)
